ValidationRule.description: At least one contact/lead name is mandatory for Meetings & Calls for profiles different from Administrator and interface
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISBLANK( WhoId ), NOT(ispickval(Type,'Call')), NOT($User.ProfileId ='00e58000000z6UE'), NOT($User.ProfileId ='00e58000000s3v6'), NOT($User.ProfileId ='00e58000000z9gq'), NOT($User.ProfileId ='00e58000000z6UC'), NOT($User.ProfileId ='00e58000000z9hS') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select a contact or lead related to this Meeting & Call record
